name: Citadel Alchemist
description: Patchable hybrid-synthesis voice with MIDI, tempo-synced pattern generation, dual FX and stereo I/O. Monophonic but heavily modulatable, it doubles as a voice, rhythm source and MIDI bridge.

controls.name: PITCH
controls.description: Sets the core pitch in a ±3 octave range from the base note.

controls.name: TIMBRE
controls.description: Sweeps the sound engine across the five synthesis modes.

controls.name: TIMBRE MOD
controls.description: Modulates timbre with bipolar depth control.

controls.name: RATIO
controls.description: Sets oscillator detune ratios and waveform blend relationships.

controls.name: ENV
controls.description: Shapes the envelope behavior and pushes the sound toward drone, body or transient focus.

controls.name: LFO MOD
controls.description: Sets depth and polarity for LFO modulation.

controls.name: MODE
controls.description: Selects the synthesis mode or morph target.

controls.name: SHIFT
controls.description: Secondary action button for triggering and alternate panel functions.

inputs.name: NOTE IN
inputs.description: Quantized pitch input; updates on trigger and follows the selected scale.

inputs.name: PLAY IN
inputs.description: Quantized pitch trigger input for the arpeggio-style upper voices.

inputs.name: MODE IN
inputs.description: CV-selects or morphs the synthesis mode.

inputs.name: C IN
inputs.description: Auxiliary control input for the pattern engine.

inputs.name: G IN
inputs.description: Auxiliary gate input for the pattern engine.

inputs.name: L/R IN
inputs.description: Stereo audio input for processing through the internal mixer and effects.

inputs.name: TRS MIDI IN
inputs.description: Front-panel TRS MIDI input for clock, notes, CC and pitch bend.

inputs.name: USB-C
inputs.description: Rear USB-C port for firmware updates, USB MIDI in/out and sample upload.

outputs.name: CLK OUT
outputs.description: Tempo output from the internal clock generator.

outputs.name: CV OUT
outputs.description: Gate-pattern CV output from the sequencer engine.

behaviors.name: Five-mode synth voice
behaviors.description: The voice moves through FILTER, FM, HYPERSINE, SUPERSAW and GLITCHNOISE while the ratio and envelope macros reshape how the mode behaves.

behaviors.name: Scale-locked note updates
behaviors.trigger: patch NOTE IN or PLAY IN
behaviors.description: The internal quantizer holds the current scale, updates notes on trigger and can preview octave and root changes through bank combinations.

behaviors.name: Pattern generator with CV and gate
behaviors.description: The built-in pattern engine generates CV and gate streams that can be synced, reset and customized from the web editor.

behaviors.name: LFO-driven groove drift
behaviors.description: The LFO can sync to clock, reset to phase zero or free-run, which makes the module behave like a small self-contained groove engine.

behaviors.name: Stereo FX split
behaviors.trigger: feed stereo audio into L/R IN
behaviors.description: The module can process external stereo audio through its dual effects section and return it as a stereo voice or modulation source.

behaviors.name: USB and TRS MIDI bridge
behaviors.trigger: connect MIDI to TRS or USB-C
behaviors.description: The module receives clock and notes over TRS MIDI and sends or receives USB MIDI on the rear connector.

patchIdeas.name: Scale-locked arp lead
patchIdeas.patch: NOTE IN takes the melody · PLAY IN advances the upper arpeggio voice · CLK IN locks the rhythm · TIMBRE at noon and RATIO slightly detuned produce a moving but still coherent lead · L/R OUT goes straight to the main output.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Citadel Alchemist:
* MODE: FILTER
* TIMBRE: noon
* RATIO: slight detune
* ENV: medium

Sequencer:
Clock:

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Citadel Alchemist (NOTE IN)
- Clock (Out) c> Citadel Alchemist (CLK IN)
- Sequencer (Gate) g> Citadel Alchemist (PLAY IN)
- Citadel Alchemist (L/R OUT) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Mode-morph drone
patchIdeas.patch: MODE CV moves between synthesis types · LFO into TIMBRE MOD and ENV MOD keeps the sound alive without constant re-patching · leave PLAY IN untriggered for long-held tones and slow harmonic drift.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Citadel Alchemist:
* MODE: FM
* ENV: long
* LFO: synced slow

LFO:
Envelope:

- LFO (Out) >> Citadel Alchemist (TIMBRE MOD)
- Envelope (Out) >> Citadel Alchemist (ENV MOD)
- Citadel Alchemist (L/R OUT) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Clocked gate machine
patchIdeas.patch: CLK IN drives the internal tempo generator · CV OUT and CLK OUT feed external drums and envelopes · use SHIFT and TAP TEMPO to re-center the feel while the module stays locked to the rack clock.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Citadel Alchemist:
* MODE: GLITCHNOISE
* ENV: short

Drum:
Envelope:

- Clock (Out) c> Citadel Alchemist (CLK IN)
- Citadel Alchemist (CV OUT) >> Drum (Accent)
- Citadel Alchemist (CLK OUT) t> Drum (Trig)
- Citadel Alchemist (ENV OUT) >> Envelope (Trig)
- Drum (Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Stereo FX insert
patchIdeas.patch: Audio into L/R IN runs through the internal dual FX block · set TIMBRE low and ENV medium for a wider, slower-moving smear · L/R OUT returns the processed signal as a stereo insert point.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Citadel Alchemist:
* MODE: FILTER
* TIMBRE: low
* ENV: medium

Audio Source:

- Audio Source (L) -> Citadel Alchemist (L/R IN)
- Audio Source (R) -> Citadel Alchemist (L/R IN)
- Citadel Alchemist (L/R OUT) -> Output (L)
- Citadel Alchemist (L/R OUT) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: MIDI bridge voice
patchIdeas.patch: USB-C on the rear bridges a DAW or controller into the module while the front panel stays fully patchable · use the pattern generator to sequence the voice and export the result as stereo audio or CV for the rest of the rack.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Citadel Alchemist:
* MODE: SUPERSAW
* ENV: medium

Computer:
Output:

- Computer (USB MIDI) >> Citadel Alchemist (USB-C)
- Citadel Alchemist (CV OUT) >> Filter (Cutoff)
- Citadel Alchemist (L/R OUT) -> Output (In)
